nodes.name: Cossypha
nodes.summary: Cossypha（Cossypha）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联8种鸟类，如Blue-shouldered robin-chat、Rüppell's robin-chat、White-browed robin-chat等8种鸟类。

nodes.name: Blue-shouldered robin-chat
nodes.summary: Blue-shouldered robin-chat（Cossypha cyanocampter）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Blue-shouldered robin-chat。

nodes.name: Blue-shouldered robin-chat
nodes.summary: The blue-shouldered robin-chat (Cossypha cyanocampter) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is widespread across the African tropical rainforest. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
